title: lippia turnerifolia var. turnerifolia
intro: Lippia turnerifolia var. turnerifolia, also known as Turnera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lippia turnerifolia var. turnerifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
